description_long: This object consists of a group of four packaged snack items, each with distinct shapes and colors. There is a rectangular orange carton with a blue cap, featuring a fruit graphic and text panels on its sides. A large, upright bag with a wheat graphic and red ribbon design suggests a grain-based snack, with printed labels on the front and back. A green cylindrical jar with a white lid and a label is positioned next to a smaller, pink bottle with a purple cap and a blue label. The packaging materials appear to be a mix of cardboard, plastic, and possibly foil, typical for urban snack products. The group is visually cohesive, with bright, inviting colors and simple, stylized graphics. These items are commonly found in urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or picnic areas.
description: A colorful group of four packaged snacks, including a carton, a bag with a wheat motif, a green jar, and a pink bottle, each with distinct labels and caps.
description_view_0: The front of the bag with a wheat graphic, the orange carton with a blue cap, and the tops of the green jar and pink bottle are visible.
description_view_1: The back of the bag and carton are shown, with the green jar and pink bottle more prominent in the foreground.
description_view_2: The green jar and pink bottle are in the foreground, with the bag and carton visible behind them, showing more of their side labels.
description_view_3: The orange carton with a fruit graphic is most visible, along with the tops of the green jar and pink bottle, and the side of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: The orange carton has a fruit graphic, possibly indicating a fruit flavor; the bag has a wheat graphic, suggesting a grain-based snack. No explicit flavor text is visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Text panels resembling nutritional information are visible on the sides of the carton and bag, but the content is not legible.
